title: Bridge Paper: Dissociative Symptoms and Interoceptive Integration.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Free will — sense of agency, voluntary action, intentional binding, volitional control.
**Phase context:** sense of agency, voluntary action, free will, intentional binding, volition

Paper: Dissociative Symptoms and Interoceptive Integration.
DOI: 10.1007/7854_2024_480
Abstract: Dissociative symptoms and disorders of dissociation are characterised by disturbances in the experience of the self and the surrounding world, manifesting as a breakdown in the normal integration of consciousness, memory, identity, emotion, and perception.
